## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test` pass locally
- [ ] Acceptance criteria in the spec map to test cases
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this is user-facing
- [ ] New signatures reference a fixture under `test/fixtures/build-logs/`
